somali.4_steps_of_decreasing_size_v_4_3_2_1_1: 4 tallaabo oo cabbir yaraanaya. V = 4 + 3 + 2 + 1 = 10 buundo.
somali.a_3_tier_step_pyramid_v_9_4_1_14_cubes: Ahraam tallaabo leh oo 3 heer ah. V = 9 + 4 + 1 = 14 buundo.
somali.a_4_4_base_with_hollow_interior_wall_t: Saldhig 4×4 oo gudaha bannaan — dhumucda darbiga 1. Kaliya tiri buundooyinka darbiga.
somali.two_pillars_connected_by_a_deck_v_6_6_: Laba tiir oo ku xiran sabayad — V = 6 + 6 + 5 = 17.
somali.tapering_tower_each_level_smaller_than: Munaarad dhuubaneysa. Heer kasta wuu ka yar yahay kii hore.
somali.5_cube_plus_shape_1_layer_v_5: Qaab isku dar oo ka kooban 5 buundo, 1 lakab. V = 5.
somali.a_simple_arch_over_an_opening: Qaanso fudud oo dul saaran bannaan.
somali.walls_flat_roof_v_4_4_base_wall_roof: Darbiyo + saqaf siman. V = 4×4 saldhig darbi + saqaf.
somali.interactive_net_drag_the_slider_to_fol: 🗺 Shabag isdhexgal ah — jiid sliderka si aad ugu laablaabto shabagga 2D prism 3D
somali.fold_the_net_from_flat_0_to_fully_fold: Laablaab shabagga laga bilaabo siman (0) ilaa si buuxda loo laablaabay (1)
somali.watch_it_fold_automatically: Daawo isagoo si toos ah u laablaabaya
somali.when_the_net_folds_up_completely_you_c: Marka shabagga si buuxda u laablaamo, waxaad aragtaa prism. Bedka dusha waa bedka dhammaan 6 wejiyada — warqadda duubista.
somali.net_the_6_faces_unfolded_onto_a_2d_lay: 🗺 Shabag — 6 wejiyada oo lagu kala fidiyay qaab 2D
somali.fold_the_net_up_and_you_get_the_prism_: Laablaab shabagga waxaadna heleysaa prism. Bedka dusha waa wadarta bedka 6 wejiyada — warqadda duubista ama rinjiga aad u baahan doonto.
somali.volume_out_of_range_for_comparison_try: Mugga ka baxsan xadka isbarbardhigga. Isku day prism yar (V ≤ 1000).
somali.volume_grows_as_the_cube_of_the_dimens: mugga wuxuu u koraa sida buundada cabbirka; bedka dusha wuxuu u koraa sida laba jibbaaran. V isku mid, laakiin bed aad u kala duwan.
somali.a_cube_is_the_most_surface_efficient_p: Buundo waa qaabka prism ee ugu waxtar badan dushiisa.
somali.it_is_why_elephants_need_thick_legs_vo: Waa sababta maroodiga u baahan yihiin lugo dhumuc leh (mug → cufka wuxuu u koraa dhaqso ka badan qaybta lafta),
somali.why_cells_stay_small_need_surface_area: sababta unugyadu yaryar u ahaadaan (waxay u baahan yihiin dusha si ay u nuugaan nafaqada), iyo sababta dahaadhka kulaylka u shaqeeya (qaababka wareegsan waxay hayaan kulaylka).
somali.tap_any_row_above_to_swap_the_3d_prism: 👆 Taabo saf kasta oo kore si aad prism 3D ugu bedesho qaabkaas — arag isla mugga qaab kale.
somali.recent_attempts_newest_at_right: Isku dayadii dhawaa (kii ugu cusub midig)
somali.reset_3d_view_rotation_and_zoom: Dib u deji wareegga iyo weynaynta muuqaalka 3D
somali.slider_v_l_w_h_watch_it_grow: Slider — V = dherer × ballac × joog, daawo isagoo koraya
somali.sliders_snap_to_integer_dimensions_gre: Sliderrada waxay ku dhegaan cabbirro dhammeystiran — waxtar u leh muuqaalka koowaad: labanlaabista dhinac kasta waxay ku dhufataa mugga 8 (2³). Bedka dusha wuxuu u cabbiraa sida 2²; mugga sida 2³. Sharciga labajibbaaran-buundo wuxuu sharraxaa sababta maroodigu u leeyihiin lugo dhumuc leh iyo sababta jiirku u dhici karo iyagoo aan dhaawac helin.
somali.freeform_build_any_shape_count_cubes: Xor — dhis qaab kasta, tiri buundooyinka
somali.l_blocks_hollow_shapes_irregular_prism: Blokyada L, qaababka bannaan, prism aan caadi ahayn. Mug = wadarta buundooyinka iyadoo aan loo eegin habka. CCSS 5.MD.5: ku xir mugga prism-ka toosan ee leydiga ah isku dhufashada iyo isku darka (V = b×h ama sida wadarta mugagga qaybaha).
somali.word_problems_volume_in_the_real_world: Dhibaatooyinka erayada — mugga adduunka dhabta ah
somali.a_fish_tank_with_5_3_4_60_cubes_of_wat: Haan kalluun 5×3×4 = 60 buundo oo biyo ah. Sanduuqa cuntada qadada 4×3×2 = 24 buundo oo sanwij ah. Isku dhufashada saddexda cabbir mid kastaa waa weel dhab ah oo awood dhab ah leh. CCSS 5.MD.5b: xalli dhibaatooyinka mugga adduunka dhabta ah.
somali.pick_a_context_to_make_volume_real: 🌍 Dooro macnaha guud si aad muggu dhab uga dhigto:
somali.the_rectangular_prism_above_shows_exac: 💡 Prism-ka leydiga ah ee kore wuxuu si sax ah u muujiyaa waxa erayadu sharxaan. Mugga waa tirada buundooyinka halbeegga ah ee gudaha ku dhex jira.
somali.adjust_the_sliders_below_to_match_the_: Hagaaji sliderrada hoose si ay ula jaanqaadaan sheekada — ama isku day macne cusub. Xalli 5 dhibaato si aad u hesho 📝 Saaxirka Erayada. Booqo dhammaan 8 macnayaasha si aad u hesho 🌍 Baaraha Adduunka Dhabta ah.
somali.click_grid_to_place_cubes_click_cube_t: 👉 Guji shabagga si aad u dhigto buundo • Guji buundo si aad u saarto • Guji kore si aad u buulto
somali.interactive_3d_viewport_drag_swipe_or_: Daaqad isdhexgal ah oo 3D ah. Jiid, sii, ama isticmaal furayaasha fallaadhaha si aad u wareejiso. Riq ama +/- si aad u weyneyso. R si aad muuqaalka dib ugu dejiso.
somali.visual_is_a_voxel_approximation_built_: ⚠ Muuqaalku waa qiyaas voxel (laga dhisay buundooyinka halbeegga). Qaacidada
somali.gives_the_exact_analytic_volume: waxay bixisaa mugga falanqaynta saxda ah =
somali.slice_horizontally_to_see_the_area_tim: Goo si toosan si aad u aragto xiriirka bedka mar mid u dhow moolka
somali.square_units_volume_cross_section_area: halbeegyo laba jibbaaran. Mug = (bedka goynta gudubka) × (moolka) waa aasaaska xisaabta isku-darka.
somali.adjust_your_predicted_dimensions_compa: Hagaaji cabbirrada aad saadaalisay, isbarbardhig prism-ka dhabta ah. Natiijo kala duwan: dhow/dhexe/fog. Dhibco ma jiraan, daaha ma jiraan.
somali.hypothesis_how_do_you_build_intuition_: Mala-awaal: Sidee ayaad u dhistaa dareen si aad u saadaaliso mugga?
somali.which_dimension_affects_volume_the_mos: Cabbirkee ayaa ugu saameyn badan mugga?
somali.try_halving_one_dimension_what_happens: Isku day inaad kala dhimo hal cabbir badh — maxaa ku dhaca mugga?
somali.when_are_predictions_hardest_when_easi: Goorma ayay saadaasha ugu adag tahay? Goorma ugu fudud?
somali.explain_how_each_dimension_contributes: Sharax sida cabbir kastaa uu wax ugu darsado mugga guud.
somali.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Qoraal naqshadeed: natiijo kala duwan oo 3 xaaladood; dhibco mug sax ah ma jiraan; daaha ma jiraan — si ula kac ah.
somali.open_buildable_challenges_library: Fur maktabadda caqabadaha la dhisi karo
somali.browse_named_structures_to_build: Baadh qaabab magacaaban si aad u dhisto
somali.buildable_challenges_pick_a_structure_: 📚 Caqabadaha la dhisi karo — dooro qaab si aad u isku dayto
somali.click_a_name_to_set_it_as_your_target_: Guji magac si aad ugu dejiso yoolkaaga — buundooyinku waxay u muuqan doonaan sida qaab-dhismeed jinni. La mid qaabka, ka dibna Hubi.
somali.reveal_the_solution_gives_up_no_badge: Muuji xalka (waad is dhiibaysaa — baljad ma jirto)
somali.export_current_construction_as_png_ima: Dhoofi dhismaha hadda sida sawir PNG
somali.download_a_png_snapshot_of_the_current: Soo dejiso sawir PNG oo dhismaha hadda
somali.nothing_saved_yet_build_something_and_: Wax weli lama kaydin. Dhis wax oo guji 💾 Kaydi.
somali.6_solids_rotating_with_live_formulas: 6 jir adag oo wareegaya oo leh qaacidooyin toos ah

lingala.4_steps_of_decreasing_size_v_4_3_2_1_1: Matambe 4 oyo ezali kokita na bonene. V = 4 + 3 + 2 + 1 = 10 bakubu.
lingala.a_3_tier_step_pyramid_v_9_4_1_14_cubes: Piramide ya matambe ya baniveau 3. V = 9 + 4 + 1 = 14 bakubu.
lingala.a_4_4_base_with_hollow_interior_wall_t: Ebandeli 4×4 na kati ya mpamba — bozindo ya efelo 1. Tanga kaka bakubu ya efelo.
lingala.two_pillars_connected_by_a_deck_v_6_6_: Makonzí mibale oyo bakangisi na pont — V = 6 + 6 + 5 = 17.
lingala.tapering_tower_each_level_smaller_than: Tour oyo ezali kokoma moke. Niveau nyonso eleki oyo ya liboso na moke.
lingala.5_cube_plus_shape_1_layer_v_5: Lolenge ya kobakisa na bakubu 5, likolo 1. V = 5.
lingala.a_simple_arch_over_an_opening: Arc ya pete likolo ya lidusu.
lingala.walls_flat_roof_v_4_4_base_wall_roof: Bifelo + motondo patatalu. V = 4×4 ebandeli ya efelo + motondo.
lingala.interactive_net_drag_the_slider_to_fol: 🗺 Filet ya interactive — benda slider mpo na kokanga filet ya 2D na prism ya 3D
lingala.fold_the_net_from_flat_0_to_fully_fold: Kanga filet uta patatalu (0) tii ekangami mobimba (1)
lingala.watch_it_fold_automatically: Tala ndenge ezali komikanga yango moko
lingala.when_the_net_folds_up_completely_you_c: Ntango filet ekangami mobimba, ozali komona prism. Etando ya likolo ezali etando ya bilongi nyonso 6 — papié ya kokanga.
lingala.net_the_6_faces_unfolded_onto_a_2d_lay: 🗺 Filet — bilongi 6 efungwami na disposition ya 2D
lingala.fold_the_net_up_and_you_get_the_prism_: Kanga filet mpe ozwi prism. Etando ya likolo ezali etando mobimba ya bilongi 6 — papié ya kokanga to langi oyo okozala na yango na mposa.
lingala.volume_out_of_range_for_comparison_try: Bunene libanda ya ndelo mpo na bokokanisi. Meka prism ya moke (V ≤ 1000).
lingala.volume_grows_as_the_cube_of_the_dimens: bunene ekoli lokola kubu ya bonene; etando ya likolo ekoli lokola karé. V ndenge moko, kasi etando ekeseni mingi.
lingala.a_cube_is_the_most_surface_efficient_p: Kubu ezali lolenge ya prism ya malamu koleka na etando.
lingala.it_is_why_elephants_need_thick_legs_vo: Yango wana banzoku basengeli na makolo ya minene (bunene → kilo ekoli mbangu koleka eteni ya mokuwa),
lingala.why_cells_stay_small_need_surface_area: mpo na nini bacellule bazali mike (basengeli na etando mpo na kozwa biloko ya bomoi), mpe mpo na nini bokangi molunge esalaka (bilolenge ya libungutulu ebombaka molunge).
lingala.tap_any_row_above_to_swap_the_3d_prism: 👆 Finá molongo nyonso na likolo mpo na kobongola prism ya 3D na lolenge wana — tala bunene moko na lolenge mosusu.
lingala.recent_attempts_newest_at_right: Bomekami ya sika (ya sika koleka na mobali)
lingala.reset_3d_view_rotation_and_zoom: Zongisa botengami mpe nene ya emonaneli 3D
lingala.slider_v_l_w_h_watch_it_grow: Slider — V = molai × mokuse × bosanda, tala ndenge ezali kokola
lingala.sliders_snap_to_integer_dimensions_gre: Ba-slider ekangamaka na biteni mobimba — malamu mpo na emonaneli ya liboso: kokomisa ngambo nyonso mbala mibale ekomisaka bunene mbala 8 (2³). Etando ya likolo emataka lokola 2²; bunene lokola 2³. Mobeko ya karé-kubu elimboli mpo na nini banzoku bazali na makolo ya minene mpe mpo na nini bampuku ya mike bakoki kokweya kozanga kozoka.
lingala.freeform_build_any_shape_count_cubes: Bonsomi — tonga lolenge nyonso, tanga bakubu
lingala.l_blocks_hollow_shapes_irregular_prism: Ba-blok L, bilolenge ya mpamba, prism oyo ezali na molongo te. Bunene = motango ya bakubu ata molongo nini. CCSS 5.MD.5: kangisa bunene ya prism ya rektangel ya semba na kobɔtɔla mpe kobakisa (V = b×h to lokola motango ya babunene ya biteni).
lingala.word_problems_volume_in_the_real_world: Mikakatano ya maloba — bunene na mokili ya solo
lingala.a_fish_tank_with_5_3_4_60_cubes_of_wat: Kesi ya mbisi ya 5×3×4 = bakubu 60 ya mai. Sanduku ya bilei ya midi ya 4×3×2 = bakubu 24 ya sandwich. Kobɔtɔla nyonso ya biteni misato ezali eloko ya solo na bokoki ya solo. CCSS 5.MD.5b: silisa mikakatano ya bunene ya mokili ya solo.
lingala.pick_a_context_to_make_volume_real: 🌍 Pona esika mpo na kokomisa bunene ya solo:
lingala.volume_answer_for_word_problem: Eyano ya bunene mpo na mokakatano ya maloba
lingala.the_rectangular_prism_above_shows_exac: 💡 Prism ya rektangel na likolo emonisi mpenza oyo maloba elobeli. Bunene ezali motango ya bakubu ya biteni oyo ekɔtaka na kati.
lingala.adjust_the_sliders_below_to_match_the_: Bongola ba-slider na nse mpo eyokana na lisolo — to meka esika ya sika. Silisa mikakatano 5 mpo na kozwa 📝 Nganga ya Maloba. Kende na bisika 8 nyonso mpo na 🌍 Molukiluki ya Mokili ya Solo.
lingala.click_grid_to_place_cubes_click_cube_t: 👉 Finá grille mpo na kotia bakubu • Finá kubu mpo na kolongola yango • Finá likolo mpo na kotanda
lingala.interactive_3d_viewport_drag_swipe_or_: Lininisa ya interactive ya 3D. Benda, sushu, to salela bafleche mpo na kobaluka. Fina to +/- mpo na konenisa. R mpo na kozongisa emonaneli.
lingala.visual_is_a_voxel_approximation_built_: ⚠ Emonaneli ezali estimasyo ya voxel (etongami na bakubu ya biteni). Formule
lingala.gives_the_exact_analytic_volume: epesaka bunene ya analyse ya solo =
lingala.slice_horizontally_to_see_the_area_tim: Kata na horizontale mpo na komona boyokani ya etando na bozindo
lingala.cross_section_layer_position: Esika ya likama ya bokatani ya nzela
lingala.square_units_volume_cross_section_area: biteni ya karé. Bunene = (etando ya bokatani ya nzela) × (bozindo) ezali ebandeli ya calcul intégral.
lingala.volume_predictor_sense_check: 📊 Molobi-liboso ya bunene — botali ya makanisi
lingala.adjust_your_predicted_dimensions_compa: Bongola biteni oyo osakolaki, kokanisa na prism ya solo. Litomba ekeseni: pene/katikati/mosika. Point te, komonisa te.
lingala.hypothesis_how_do_you_build_intuition_: Likanisi: Ndenge nini otongaka mayele mpo na kosakola bunene?
lingala.which_dimension_affects_volume_the_mos: Eteni nini ezali kobebisa bunene mingi koleka?
lingala.try_halving_one_dimension_what_happens: Meka kokitisa eteni moko na katikati — nini ekosalema na bunene?
lingala.when_are_predictions_hardest_when_easi: Ntango nini bosakoli ezali makasi koleka? Ntango nini pete koleka?
lingala.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Nasosoli — limbola na maloba na ngai
lingala.explain_how_each_dimension_contributes: Limbola ndenge eteni nyonso esalisaka na bunene mobimba.
lingala.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Note ya design: litomba ekeseni ya baetat 3; point ya bunene ya solo te; komonisa te — na nko.
lingala.open_buildable_challenges_library: Fungola bibliotèki ya badéfi oyo bakoki kotonga
lingala.browse_named_structures_to_build: Tala bandako oyo ezali na bankombo mpo na kotonga
lingala.buildable_challenges_pick_a_structure_: 📚 Badéfi oyo bakoki kotonga — pona ndako moko mpo na komeka
lingala.click_a_name_to_set_it_as_your_target_: Finá nkombo mpo na kotia yango lokola mokano na yo — bakubu ekomonana lokola milongo ya elilingi. Kokanisa lolenge, na sima Tala.
lingala.real_world_unit_selector: Moponi ya biteni ya mokili ya solo
lingala.allow_fractional_dimensions: Pesa nzela na biteni ya ndambo
lingala.save_current_dims_cubes_with_a_name: Bomba biteni + bakubu ya sika na nkombo
lingala.export_current_construction_as_png_ima: Tinda botongi ya sika lokola elilingi PNG
lingala.download_a_png_snapshot_of_the_current: Kitisa elilingi PNG ya botongi ya sika
lingala.in_real_world_units_volume: 🌍 Na biteni ya mokili ya solo: Bunene =
lingala.nothing_saved_yet_build_something_and_: Eloko ebombami naino te. Tonga eloko mpe finá 💾 Bomba.
lingala.6_solids_rotating_with_live_formulas: Biloko makasi 6 oyo ezali kobaluka na ba-formule ya mbala moko
